pageContext.name: Wolverine #1 (Variant Edition)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to bring you the Wolverine #1 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  Created as variant cover art for Wolverine #1 by the acclaimed comic artist Jeehyung Lee, this print features Wolverine fearlessly squared to attack the most infamous of X-Men antagonists, the Sentinels. With claws captured so brilliantly you can almost hear the SNIKT echo from the print, this comic artwork is sure to make an exciting addition to any collection.  You picked the RIGHT house, Bub! Limited to 125 pieces, be sure to add Wolverine to your Marvel art gallery today!
